Regarding the upcoming QAQC Audit of the Unigaz Office, conducted by BGC and AEB consultants on 31-10-2022, as per the Ashghal instruction, it is mandatory for you to initiate the work for this project.  

Please arrange and confirm the email for communication regarding this audit.  

Thank you for your cooperation.
